_comment: Production source candidates for Phase 13 final audit. Config only: no real fetch/download/cut/upload/post is authorized by this file.
_warning: All fixed sources are user-provided candidates. active=false and fetch_enabled=false are intentional safety gates.
_note: Query sources use source_platform=query so legacy fixed-source count checks for x/youtube/note remain stable.

safety_defaults.candidate_status: candidate unless beauty TikTok/X disabled pending review
